gearsOfDayReleasePlatforms.title: Gears of War: E-Day Release Date, Platforms, Game Pass, and Steam
gearsOfDayReleasePlatforms.intro: Gears of War: E-Day launches on October 6, 2026 for Xbox Series X|S and Windows PC. It is also listed for Steam, Xbox Play Anywhere, Game Pass day-one access, and Xbox cloud play through Game Pass.

items.label: Release Date
items.description: The standard launch date for Gears of War: E-Day is October 6, 2026.

items.label: Main Platforms
items.value: Xbox Series X|S and Windows 10/11 PC
items.description: The official Xbox game page lists Xbox Series X|S and Windows 10/11 as the core platforms.

items.label: Steam Availability
items.description: Gears of War: E-Day is available to pre-purchase on Steam for PC, with the Steam listing showing an October 6, 2026 release date.

items.label: Microsoft Store
items.description: Players can pre-order through the Microsoft Store for Xbox Series X|S and PC.

items.label: Xbox Play Anywhere
items.value: Buy once, play on Xbox console and PC
items.description: A Microsoft Store purchase supports Xbox Play Anywhere, giving access on Xbox console and PC with no extra game purchase.

items.label: Game Pass
items.description: Gears of War: E-Day is included with Game Pass on day one, including Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass access paths.

items.label: Cloud Play
items.description: Xbox lists cloud streaming for Gears of War: E-Day through Game Pass, giving another way to play without a local install.

items.label: Developer and Publisher
items.description: Gears of War: E-Day is developed by The Coalition and published by Xbox Game Studios.

gearsOfDayPreOrderEditions.title: Gears of War: E-Day Editions, Early Access, and Pre-Order Bonuses
gearsOfDayPreOrderEditions.intro: Compare Standard Edition, Premium Edition, Premium Edition Upgrade, and Collector's Edition. The main differences are early access, Premium cosmetic packs, 1,000 Iron, campaign weapon bonuses, and physical collector items.

editions.name: Standard Edition
editions.earlyAccess: Open Beta early access starts August 6, 2026
included: Gears of War: E-Day base game
editions.bestFor: Players who want the base game, a Game Pass alternative, or the simplest pre-order path.

editions.name: Premium Edition
editions.access: Play up to 5 days early from October 1, 2026
editions.earlyAccess: Open Beta early access starts August 6, 2026
included: Gears of War: E-Day digital game
Bravo Squad Signature Weapon Pack for campaign
editions.bestFor: Players who want early launch access and the full digital Premium content bundle.

editions.name: Premium Edition Upgrade
editions.access: Requires the base game or Xbox Game Pass Ultimate membership
editions.earlyAccess: Adds up to 5-days early access from October 1, 2026
included: Bravo Squad Signature Weapon Pack for campaign
Five Seasonal Customization Packs starting with the Emergence Pack
editions.bestFor: Game Pass Ultimate members or base-game owners who want Premium benefits without buying the full Premium Edition.

editions.name: Collector's Edition
editions.access: Includes the base game plus Premium Edition digital upgrade content
included: 15-inch Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago collectible diorama statue
1:1 scale replica of Carlos Santiago's COG tags (metal zinc alloy and brass)
Luke Preece designed custom SteelBook case
Gears of War: E-Day base game
editions.bestFor: Collectors who want physical Gears items plus the Premium digital content package.

gearsOfDayOpenBetaAccess.title: Gears of War: E-Day Open Beta Access and Beta Code Rules
gearsOfDayOpenBetaAccess.intro: Open Beta early access begins on August 6, 2026 for eligible pre-orders. Digital buyers do not need a beta code, while physical buyers should receive a code from participating retailers.

steps.title: Pre-order any edition for Open Beta early access
steps.description: Pre-ordering Standard Edition, Premium Edition, Premium Edition Upgrade, or Collector's Edition grants early access to the Gears of War: E-Day Open Beta.

steps.title: Use automatic access for digital pre-orders
steps.description: Players who digitally pre-order Gears of War: E-Day are automatically granted Early Access to the Open Beta and do not need a separate beta code.

steps.title: Use retailer beta codes for physical pre-orders
steps.description: Players who pre-order a physical edition should receive a beta code at the point of sale from participating retailers.

steps.title: Redeem physical beta codes through the official Xbox code flow
steps.description: Physical pre-order beta access uses a single-use code from the retailer. Keep the purchase email or printed receipt because the code is tied to that sale path.
steps.date: Before or during the beta window

steps.title: Claim launch pre-order items through the same purchase path
steps.description: Digital pre-orders receive the Exfil Dom Legendary Character Skin and Exfil Legendary Weapon Skin Set automatically. Physical pre-orders may receive launch bonus codes by email or printed receipt, depending on region and retailer.

steps.title: Use Game Pass correctly for online multiplayer
steps.description: Game Pass provides day-one game access, and online multiplayer features may require a Game Pass subscription that includes online multiplayer. Beta early access remains tied to the official pre-order access rules.

gearsOfDayBeginnerGuide.title: Gears of War: E-Day Beginner Guide for Campaign, Co-Op, and Cover Combat
gearsOfDayBeginnerGuide.intro: Start with the campaign basics: cover-based combat, modernized movement, solo or co-op play, Bravo Squad, Horde Siege, and Versus. Gears of War: E-Day keeps classic Gears combat while rebuilding movement, enemies, visuals, and multiplayer systems for the new entry.

steps.title: Start with the campaign to learn the combat flow
steps.description: The Gears of War: E-Day campaign follows Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago during Emergence Day. It can be played solo, in two-player split-screen co-op on console, or with up to four players online.

steps.title: Use cover as your default survival tool
steps.description: Gears of War: E-Day brings back iconic cover-based combat. Move from cover to cover, avoid open lanes, and use the environment before pushing into close-range fights.

steps.title: Learn the modernized movement system early
steps.description: Movement and traversal are modernized to add more freedom and verticality. Practice repositioning, climbing routes, and safer angles instead of standing still behind one wall.

steps.title: Understand Bravo Squad before playing co-op
steps.description: The campaign is told through Bravo Squad. Marcus, Dom, Mags Carter, and Lucas Reyes are playable from the start in online co-op, giving the squad structure without forcing players away from the main story.

steps.title: Treat first-contact Locust encounters as close-range threats
steps.description: Gears of War: E-Day is built around the horror and confusion of the Locust Horde first erupting from below. Reimagined enemies, Wretches, and new creatures are designed to make early encounters feel dangerous.

steps.title: Use co-op based on your platform
steps.description: Console players can use two-player split-screen, while online campaign co-op supports up to four players. Online co-op and multiplayer features may require a subscription that includes online multiplayer.

steps.title: Try Horde Siege after learning campaign fundamentals
steps.description: Horde Siege is the evolved PvE wave-survival mode in Gears of War: E-Day. It is a good next stop after learning weapons, movement, cover habits, and team positioning.

steps.title: Move into Versus when you are ready for PvP
steps.description: Versus includes competitive PvP across new maps and refined fan-favorite 4v4 modes. The Xbox Store lists online multiplayer support for 2 to 12 players and cross-platform multiplayer.

steps.title: Use returning and new weapons for close-quarters fights
steps.description: Fan-favorite weapons return and are reimagined, while new weapons are built for brutal close-quarters combat. Beginners should test weapon range and reload timing before rushing enemies.

steps.title: Set expectations for performance and display features
steps.description: Gears of War: E-Day is rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5 and is designed for modern performance, with 4K resolution and up to 60 FPS across Campaign and Multiplayer on compatible displays.

quickTips: Stay in cover and reposition constantly instead of holding one wall.
Learn slide, jump, and vertical flank routes before pushing aggressive fights.
Test weapon range and reload timing in the campaign before entering Versus.
Coordinate squad roles in Horde Siege so Assault, Marksman, Medic, and Breacher each cover a job.

gearsOfDayCampaignTimeline.title: Gears of War: E-Day Campaign Story and Timeline
gearsOfDayCampaignTimeline.intro: Gears of War: E-Day is set fourteen years before the original Gears of War and follows Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago during the first Locust emergence on Sera. The campaign plays out in the city of Kalona across three days.

phases.title: After the Pendulum Wars
phases.timeframe: Shortly after peace is declared on Sera
phases.description: Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago return from the Pendulum Wars as young veterans. Both are carrying the loss of Carlos Santiago, Dom's older brother and Marcus's best friend, which gives their relationship a distant and wounded starting point.
phases.role: Sets the emotional foundation before the Locust invasion begins.

phases.title: The Ground Opens in Kalona
phases.description: Marcus and Dom are in Kalona for an armistice memorial when the ground opens and the Locust emerge from below. The first encounters are built around confusion, fear, and first contact with creatures the people of Sera do not yet have names for.
phases.role: Introduces the horror of the Locust as an unknown force attacking a city in real time.

phases.title: Four Gears Run Toward the Fight
phases.description: Bravo Squad forms when Marcus, Dom, Mags Carter, and Lucas Reyes face the first outbreak together. Mags is a former Gear working at Kalona's Imulsion Refinery, while Lucas is a young cadet and communications officer who never saw the front lines.
phases.role: Builds the playable squad around shared instinct, loyalty, and survival under pressure.

phases.title: Regrouping and Military Response
phases.description: The campaign moves from shock into regrouping as Bravo Squad connects with military forces and begins taking on missions across Kalona. The city includes districts such as a sports stadium, industrial waterfront, airfield, refinery zones, and dense residential areas.
phases.role: Turns the invasion from isolated panic into a coordinated battle for the city.

phases.title: Kalona Falls Into Desperation
phases.timeframe: The scale becomes impossible to ignore
phases.description: By the third day, the invasion is clearly not an isolated attack. The Locust threat escalates from Feral Wretches into Drones and organized enemy forces, while Bravo Squad sees that Emergence Day is a world-changing catastrophe.
phases.role: Shows the shift from monster invasion to full-scale war.

phases.title: Solo, Split-Screen, and Online Co-Op
phases.description: The Gears of War: E-Day campaign can be played solo, in two-player split-screen on console, or in up to four-player online co-op. The four Bravo Squad characters are playable from the start.
phases.role: Lets players experience the origin story alone or as a squad.

gearsOfDayHordeAndVersus.title: Gears of War: E-Day Horde Siege and Versus Modes
gearsOfDayHordeAndVersus.intro: Gears of War: E-Day brings back multiplayer with a larger PvE Horde Siege mode and refined 4v4 Versus PvP across new Kalona maps, built around squad play, bigger combat spaces, and modernized movement.

modes.maps: Larger city maps set in Kalona
modes.description: Horde Siege reimagines Gears of War: E-Day's co-op wave survival as a bigger PvE battlefield where multiple squads defend Kalona from the Locust.

modes.maps: All-new maps in and around war-torn Kalona
modes.description: Versus returns with refined competitive PvP, classic symmetrical Gears map design, and new traversal opportunities built around E-Day's movement systems.
objectives: Use cover, flanks, and vertical routes
rewards: Complete in-game challenges, events, and achievements

modes.description: Ranked is built for players who want structured competition and progression through skill-focused PvP matches.

modes.maps: Versus maps with a more relaxed match flow
modes.description: Social playlists give players a less intense way to play Versus while still using Gears of War: E-Day's updated movement, traversal, and cover combat.

Players can try multiplayer before launch through Open Beta weekends starting August 6, 2026. Early access to the first weekend is tied to pre-order access or Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass subscription access.
objectives: Test Horde Siege and Versus systems
rewards: Pre-order bonuses include the Exfil Dom Character Skin and Exfil Weapon Skin Set at launch

gearsOfDayWeaponsCombat.title: Gears of War: E-Day Weapons and Combat Mechanics
gearsOfDayWeaponsCombat.intro: Gears of War: E-Day keeps Gears' cover-based combat while rebuilding weapons, traversal, enemy encounters, and destruction for larger city fights. Returning weapons sit beside new close-quarters tools, while sliding, jumping, vertical flanks, E-Holes, sinkholes, and micro-destruction change how fights unfold across Kalona.

items.name: Gnasher
items.description: The Gnasher remains the close-range king and anchors classic Gears of War: E-Day close-quarters fights.
items.bestUse: Push tight spaces, punish enemies at short range, and control aggressive cover-to-cover engagements.

items.name: Longshot
items.description: The Longshot rewards patience and precision at distance, especially when players use balconies, rooftops, and elevated routes for flanking.
items.bestUse: Hold sightlines, pick enemies from range, and support squadmates from vertical positions.

items.name: Gut Puncher
items.description: The Gut Puncher is a grenade launcher that fires armor-piercing explosive rounds with player-controlled detonation.
items.bestUse: Quick-fire for immediate blasts or hold the trigger to place explosions behind enemy cover.

items.name: Incinerator
items.description: The Incinerator is a new shotgun powered by Imulsion, built for brutal close-range damage in Gears of War: E-Day.
items.bestUse: Use in close-quarters fights where fast enemy pressure makes space control more important than precision.

items.name: Chainsaw Lancer Origin
items.description: The Chainsaw Lancer is born on the battlefield during E-Day, kit-bashed from a prototype on the front lines of the invasion.
items.bestUse: Represents the origin of one of the series' defining weapons during the first Locust War crisis.

items.name: Cover Transitions
items.description: Cover transitions are smoother and support a wider range of cover heights and shapes, including low-ground cover for more organic combat spaces.
items.bestUse: Move through firefights more fluidly while staying inside the classic Gears cover-combat rhythm.

items.name: Slide
items.description: Players can slide from sprint, including under objects, around corners, and directly into cover.
items.bestUse: Escape danger, close distance, or reach cover during fast, chaotic fights.

items.name: Jump and Vertical Flanks
items.description: For the first time in Gears, players can jump, opening routes across rooftops, crumbling buildings, balconies, and elevated flanking paths.
items.bestUse: Attack from above, split enemy attention, and combine squad approaches across different routes.

items.name: E-Holes
items.description: E-Holes return in Gears of War: E-Day as both spectacle and tactical threat. Locust can emerge from the ground, and a well-placed grenade can close the hole.
items.bestUse: React quickly to enemy spawns, use explosives to stop pressure, and prevent fights from escalating.

items.name: Sinkholes
items.description: At larger scales, sinkholes can pull down vehicles and entire buildings as the Locust assault reshapes Kalona.
items.bestUse: Adds battlefield spectacle and environmental danger during major city encounters.

items.name: Micro-Destruction
items.description: Micro-destruction chips away at cover across different materials, making defensive positions less permanent.
items.bestUse: Pressure enemies hiding behind cover and adapt when your own cover starts breaking down.

gearsOfDayPCRequirements.title: Gears of War: E-Day PC Requirements and Performance
gearsOfDayPCRequirements.intro: Gears of War: E-Day is listed for Steam and Windows 10/11 PC, with a 130 GB SSD requirement and modern GPU targets. Use this section to check the official PC requirements, Steam availability, and Xbox Series X|S performance features before launch.

rows.label: Graphics
rows.value: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5050 / RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 6600 / RX 9060 / Intel Arc A580

rows.label: Graphics
rows.value: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 / RTX 3060 Ti / AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT / RX 9060 XT / Intel Arc B580

rows.label: Steam
rows.value: Available to wishlist and pre-purchase on Steam

rows.label: Xbox Play Anywhere

rows.value: Playable day one with Game Pass

rows.label: Xbox Live Account
rows.value: Steam listing requires a third-party Xbox Live account

rows.label: Resolution and Frame Rate
rows.value: Built for 4K resolution and up to 60 FPS across Campaign and Multiplayer

rows.label: Display Features
rows.value: 4K Ultra HD, HDR10, and Variable Refresh Rate

rows.label: Audio Features

rows.label: Input Features
rows.value: Console keyboard and mouse support, PC game pad support

rows.label: Multiplayer Capability
rows.value: Online multiplayer supports up to 12 players

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Gears of War: E-Day

questions.question: When does Gears of War: E-Day release?
questions.answer: Gears of War: E-Day launches on October 6, 2026 for Xbox Series X|S and Windows PC, with day-one Game Pass access and an Open Beta starting August 6, 2026.

questions.question: Which platforms support Gears of War: E-Day?
questions.answer: Gears of War: E-Day is available on Xbox Series X|S, Windows 10/11 PC, Steam, and Xbox Play Anywhere, with cloud play through Game Pass.

questions.question: Is there an open beta for Gears of War: E-Day?
questions.answer: Yes. Gears of War: E-Day Open Beta early access begins August 6, 2026 for eligible pre-orders, with automatic access for digital buyers and retailer codes for physical pre-orders.

questions.question: Does Gears of War: E-Day support campaign co-op?
questions.answer: Yes. The Gears of War: E-Day campaign supports solo play, two-player split-screen on console, and up to four-player online co-op with Marcus, Dom, Mags, and Lucas playable from the start.

questions.question: What is Horde Siege in Gears of War: E-Day?
questions.answer: Horde Siege is Gears of War: E-Day's 12-player PvE mode where three four-player squads defend Kalona from the Locust, with Assault, Marksman, Medic, and Breacher classes.

questions.question: Is Gears of War: E-Day on Game Pass?
questions.answer: Yes. Gears of War: E-Day is included with Game Pass on day one, including Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass access paths.

cta.title: Ready to Survive Gears of War E-Day?
cta.description: Pre-order now, jump into the open beta, and lock in Horde Siege and Versus updates from the official Gears of War channels.
